news.title: GGS Hub Official Release!
news.desc: The official GGS Hub app is now live on Google Play. Your gateway to everything Greek Games Studios.
news.fullText: We are excited to announce that GGS Hub is now officially available on Google Play. The official app for Greek Games Studios keeps you connected with our latest games, news and updates. A key feature is the built-in mini games where you can earn GGS Coins and redeem them in our upcoming titles for exclusive rewards and content. Browse our portfolio, track development progress and start collecting coins today. This is just the beginning, we plan to expand the app with more features based on your feedback. Download GGS Hub now and take Greek Games Studios with you wherever you go!
news.author: Greek Games Studios
news.articleBody: We are excited to announce that GGS Hub is now officially available on Google Play. Browse our portfolio, track development progress and start collecting coins today. This is just the beginning, we plan to expand the app with more features based on your feedback. Download GGS Hub now and take Greek Games Studios with you wherever you go!

news.title: Play & Demos v2: Major Update!
news.desc: A massive update packed with optimizations, reworks and 5 brand new mini games!
news.fullText: We are thrilled to announce the release of Play & Demos v2 a massive update packed with optimizations, reworks and brand new mini games! This update focuses on improving performance, fixing various issues and expanding the experience with more content and features. What's new in v2: Optimizations: Faster loading times and smoother gameplay across all mini games. Reworks: Several existing mini games have been redesigned with better mechanics, improved visuals and additional features. New Mini Games: We've added 5 brand new titles to the Play & Demos library, each offering unique challenges and fun experiences. Bug Fixes: Addressed stability issues and resolved physics control bugs affecting gameplay responsiveness. This is just the beginning, we will continue to support and expand Play & Demos with regular updates. Your feedback helps us grow, so don't hesitate to share your thoughts.
news.author: Greek Games Studios

news.title: Play & Demos Is Now Live!
news.desc: Play & Demos is now live on our website. Access mini games, prototypes and demos.
news.fullText: We are proud to announce that Play & Demos is now live on our website. Through Play & Demos, you can access and play our mini games, as well as selected prototypes and demos from games we have already released. This allows you to explore our work, our ideas and parts of the development process. This is an important milestone for us and we will continue to expand it with more content over time. We look forward to your feedback.

news.title: Try Not To Rage: Sky Official Release!
news.desc: The newest game in the Try Not To Rage series is now officially available on Google Play.
news.fullText: The long-awaited Try Not To Rage: Sky is finally here! The newest game in the Try Not To Rage series is now officially available on the Google Play Store. Take your rage challenge to the skies with brand new levels, smoother gameplay and improved visuals designed to push your patience to the limit. Compete against yourself, test your reflexes and experience the next evolution of the series that started it all. Download Try Not To Rage: Sky today on the Google Play Store and see if you can reach the top without losing control!
news.author: Greek Games Studios

Compete against yourself, test your reflexes and experience the next evolution of the series that started it all. news.title: Monetization Is Now Live!
news.desc: Monetization is now live in Try Not To Rage: Forest and will gradually be added to all future titles.
news.fullText: Monetization is now live in our game Try Not To Rage: Forest and will gradually be added to all our future titles. By choosing to watch a few ads, you can support us completely for free and help us keep creating new experiences for everyone. The next Try Not To Rage game is also coming very soon. While there are still some small issues to be resolved, our team is working daily to fix them as quickly as possible. Thank you for your continued support.
news.author: Greek Games Studios

While there are still some small issues to be resolved, our team is working daily to fix them as quickly as possible. Thank you for your continued support.

news.title: Development Update: Monetization & Delays
news.desc: Working on in-app monetization. The monetization update and Try Not To Rage: Sky will face delays.
news.fullText: At Greek Games Studios, we are currently working on an important new step for our games: implementing in-app monetization. This means that players will soon be able to experience our games not only as free releases but also with new ways to support our work and access extra features. However, while setting this up we have encountered several technical issues, including Gradle failures, permissions and other unexpected obstacles. Because of these challenges, the final monetization update for Try Not To Rage: Forest, the release of Try Not To Rage: Sky, as well as other projects in progress will unfortunately face delays. As a small team, we cannot make everything happen overnight, but we are working every single day to solve these problems and move forward. We sincerely apologize for these delays and thank you for your patience and continued support.
news.author: Greek Games Studios
news.articleBody: At Greek Games Studios, we are currently working on an important new step for our games: implementing in-app monetization. We sincerely apologize for these delays and thank you for your patience and continued support.

news.title: Try Not To Rage: Forest
news.desc: Try Not To Rage: Forest is officially online with the third trailer and back story.
news.fullText: Try Not To Rage: Forest is officially online! Try Not To Rage: Forest is officially online with the third trailer. Watch the third trailer and learn the character's back story. Play the game and try not to rage! Our team is working on the next game for this series.

news.title: Try Not To Rage: Forest
news.desc: The release of Try Not To Rage: Forest will be delayed due to Google Play Store approval and testing.
news.fullText: The release of Try Not To Rage: Forest will be delayed! Due to external factors related to the game's distribution process. Specifically: The approval and publishing process on the Google Play Store is particularly strict and requires additional time. In addition, the testing cycle with testers must be completed, as it is essential in order to finalize the official release. Our team is closely monitoring these procedures and working to ensure that the game will be available as soon as possible. We sincerely thank you for your understanding and continued support.

news.title: Announces
news.desc: Something Is Coming… June 16th Marks the Dawn of a New Era by Greek Games Studios.
news.fullText: Something Is Coming… June 16th Marks the Dawn of a New Era by Greek Games Studios. June 16th, 2025, Greek Games Studios will unveil something... unexpected. A new game announcement. Major game updates. Official NEXIS AI showcase. Watch the official trailer now on our social media.

news.title: NEXIS AI
news.desc: NEXIS: The Ultimate AI Experience by Greek Games Studios. Step Into the Future of Intelligence!
news.fullText: NEXIS: The Ultimate AI Experience by Greek Games Studios. Step Into the Future of Intelligence! Greek Games Studios proudly presents NEXIS, the most advanced AI we've ever created! Smart responses & data analysis. Real-time natural conversation. Unmatched adaptability for any use. Are you ready to experience the future? Stay tuned something big is coming!

news.title: Unlimited Roleplay Roblox
news.desc: Unlimited Roleplay: The Ultimate Greek RP Experience on Roblox. A New Era of Limitless Roleplay Begins!
news.fullText: Unlimited Roleplay: The Ultimate Greek RP Experience on Roblox. A New Era of Limitless Roleplay Begins! Greek Games Studios παρουσιάζει με υπερηφάνεια: Unlimited Roleplay. Η απόλυτη εμπειρία Greek RP στο Roblox! Ρεαλιστική οικονομία και επαγγέλματα. Προηγμένοι μηχανισμοί ρόλων. Ατελείωτες δυνατότητες για κάθε παίκτη. Είσαι έτοιμος να μπεις σε έναν κόσμο απεριόριστου roleplay? Μείνε συντονισμένος κάτι μεγάλο έρχεται!
